name: BG-777
description: BG-777 is an immunomodulator with proven efficacy against viral and bacterial infections in preclinical studies.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in cytomegalovirus (CMV) retinitis, HIV infection, influenza, and pneumonia.
mechanismOfAction: BG-777 will activate the cells of the immune system and improve its ability to clear the virus, and resist infection.
